function.message: I can’t fully complete this inbox request because one of the five listed files is missing from the workspace. I verified four requested purchase records, but the fifth listed item cannot be found, so I stopped without making any edits.
function.rulebook_notes: Per inbox-processing and v2 update workflows, do not leave partial edits when a requested item is not doable; stop and ask for clarification without mutating files.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction in 00_inbox/724_next-task.md requests OCR on five specific files. Four were readable, but the fifth listed item could not be located (find returned no match), so completing the full request would require guessing or partial completion.
